title: Site & Operations Coordinator – Construction Equipment
description:
• Well Established Company
  • Basic $ 4000 to $ 4500 + AWS + Variable Bonus
  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career progression
  • Working location: Tuas (Company Transport Provided)
  • Working hours: Normal Working Hours
  • Possessing own transport would be an advantage


Job Scope:


  • Assist the Head of Operations in daily activities and project coordination
  • Conduct site surveys and prepare technical documents (e.g. method statements, risk assessments, lifting plans, etc.)
  • Arrange manpower, equipment, and transport for site works
  • Oversee installation, commissioning, inspection, maintenance, shifting, and dismantling of construction equipment
  • Perform regular site inspections and ensure work meets client requirements and safety standards
  • Prepare and submit reports, checklists, and documentation to customers and internal teams
  • Coordinate with engineers on drawings, testing, and certification submissions
  • Conduct user training, safety briefings, and support safety campaigns
  • Investigate incidents and prepare incident reports
  • Support the training, productivity, and well-being of assigned site teams
  • Track equipment inventory and ensure proper usage and return
  • Use ERP system to manage tasks and generate reports
  • Maintain records for audits and ensure compliance with company policies, ISO standards, and government regulations
  • Perform other duties as assigned


Requirements:


  • NITEC and/or Diploma in M&E/Civil/Construction or equivalent
  • 1 -4 years of experience in Site Coordination or relevant


Candidates are encouraged to apply for this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume


  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



NG DIAUM YEE (R2198031)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492

Accomplishment – We strive to accomplish all planned objectives and conquering set milestones.

Accountable – We are accountable for our actions, decisions, and consequences.

We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.
